ValidationRule.description: [AUT,CHE,HRV,HUN,SVN,SRB]: Restriction for Sphere_of_Influence__c value when the case catagory is "Quality management" and Extternal_Case_Detail__c is " ALD clients services"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Category__c,"Quality management"), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Detail__c,"ALD clients services"), ISBLANK(TEXT(Sphere_of_Influence__c)), CONTAINS( $Label.ALDCRM_Commercial_Gesture_Amount_Record_Types, RecordTypeId ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose an option from the picklist "Sphere of Influence" after having selected "ALD clients services"
